mapper.select: WITH unsigned_signatures AS ( SELECT SUBSTRING(ai.target_id, 0, 5) AS write_year, ai.target_type AS doc_type, SUBSTRING(ai.target_id, 5, 5) AS doc_no FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai WHERE ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND ai.target_type IN ('TRR', 'RORAT', 'OHC', 'PAC', 'WOOHA', 'TBM') -- :doc_types AND ai.created_at::DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND (ai.signature IS NULL OR ai.signature = '') AND ai.target_id IS NOT NULL AND ai.target_id != '' ORDER BY ai.target_type, ai.created_at ), tbm AS ( SELECT CONCAT(t.write_year, '-', t.doc_type, '-', t.doc_no) AS id, t.doc_type, t.work_nm AS content, -- nullable CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.tbm_date, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.tbm_date, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, -- nullable t.created_at -- nullable FROM unsigned_signatures us JOIN esg.tb_toolboxmeeting t ON t.write_year = us.write_year AND t.doc_type = us.doc_type AND t.doc_no = us.doc_no AND t.comp_id = #{compId} AND t.use_yn ='Y' ), commitees AS ( SELECT CONCAT(c.write_year, '-', c.doc_type, '-', c.doc_no) AS id, c.doc_type, c.comm_nm AS content, -- nullable CASE WHEN COALESCE(c.comm_dt, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(c.comm_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, -- nullable c.created_at -- nullable FROM unsigned_signatures us JOIN esg.tb_committee c ON c.write_year = us.write_year AND c.doc_type = us.doc_type AND c.doc_no = us.doc_no AND c.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND c.use_yn = 'Y' ), trainings AS ( SELECT CONCAT(t.write_year, '-', t.doc_type, '-', t.doc_no) AS id, t.doc_type, t.title AS content, -- nullable CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_date, '') != '' THEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_start, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(t.training_start FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS started_at, -- nullable t.created_at -- nullable FROM unsigned_signatures us JOIN esg.tb_training_result_report t ON t.write_year = us.write_year AND t.doc_type = us.doc_type AND t.doc_no = us.doc_no AND t.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND t.use_yn = 'Y' UNION SELECT CONCAT(rt.write_year, '-', rt.doc_type, '-', rt.doc_no) AS id, rt.doc_type, rt.asmnt_content AS content, -- nullable CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_date, '') != '' THEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_start_time, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(rt.asmnt_start_time FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS started_at, -- nullable rt.created_at -- nullable FROM unsigned_signatures us JOIN esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training rt ON rt.write_year = us.write_year AND rt.doc_type = us.doc_type AND rt.doc_no = us.doc_no AND rt.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND rt.use_yn = 'Y' ), worker_opinions AS ( SELECT CONCAT(wo.write_year, '-', wo.doc_type, '-', wo.doc_no) AS id, wo.doc_type, wo.worker_opinion AS content, -- nullable NULL::timestamp AS started_at, -- nullable wo.created_at -- nullable FROM unsigned_signatures us JOIN esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info wo ON wo.write_year = us.write_year AND wo.doc_type = us.doc_type AND wo.doc_no = us.doc_no AND wo.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND wo.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT id, doc_type AS category, content, started_at AS startedAt, created_at AS created_at FROM ( SELECT * FROM tbm UNION SELECT * FROM commitees UNION SELECT * FROM trainings UNION SELECT * FROM worker_opinions ) l ORDER BY l.doc_type, l.created_at
